display.$description: Use for large marketing like headings

header.$description: Use for titles of sections on a screen

body.$description: Use for displaying paragraphs of text.

label.$description: Use for displaying titles of UI elements

value-mono.$description: Use for values that need a mono spaced font to display properly

value-condensed.$description: Use for wide values to you want to fit as much as possible on a row.

content-gap.$description: Gap between items inside of tabitem
